name: nkeys8_steps500
hypothesis: the ~0.30 plateau at n_keys=4 may be partly a task-difficulty artifact — with only 4 keys the model can hit ~0.30 by digit-frequency guessing with no real retrieval pressure. Raising retrieval load to n_keys=8 tests whether the plateau holds under real retrieval demand: if tokacc collapses well below 0.30 the easy-task plateau was guessing (and n_keys=4 is the wrong difficulty to discriminate configs); if the model shows actual learning/climb, harder tasks force retrieval and may break the plateau.
